content: agent2: implementing 'Add Search Path Monitoring for Automatic Template Cache Invalidation' feature - adding auto_reload param, _environments WeakSet, _on_template_changed method to FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Will touch loaders.py and possibly environment.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

Thanks for the heads up. I'm only touching FileSystemLoader.__init__ (adding auto_reload param + _environments WeakSet) and adding new methods (_on_template_changed, helper for path->template name) after get_source/list_templates. I won't touch the body of get_source's path-joining logic, so your normpath change there should be safe. I may also add a small hook in environment.py's Environment.__init__ to register environments with the loader. Will ping again before finalizing in case of conflicts.

agent2: done. Final changes: FileSystemLoader.__init__ gained auto_reload=True param + _environments WeakSet; added _register_environment, _path_to_template_name, _on_template_changed methods. Also added a small generic hook (_register_loader_environment) in environment.py's Environment.__init__/overlay() to register environments with any loader that supports it via duck-typing. Verified 841 existing tests pass + manual smoke test of cache invalidation and GC. patch.txt written.
